session_note: S30 P0 — Voltkin Regression Repair + Self-Sufficient Alive Pipeline. URGENCY DETECTED (user reports regressions on live site spark-online.space, voltkin static instead of mp4 + no movement/laser post-cinematic). USER PRE-APPROVED execution with constraint flip (no user slicing). Standard-tier PDR locked after Grok pre-mortem audit (3 deltas applied) + Gemini quota exhausted (4h42m refresh, accepted Rule 17 fallback). SCOPE: P0a cutsceneOverlay.ts cinematic fix (defensive multi-fix muted=true + Texture.from after loadeddata + autoUpdate=true + ticker update + drop crossOrigin + debug logs + video.load+currentTime nudge per Grok-DG1), P0b main.ts+creatureLifecycle ATTACK FSM diagnostic (read pendingCreatureSpawn poll first per Grok-DG2, add debug logs, fix surfaced bugs in-place), P0c new src/render/arcFlash.ts cyan lightning bolt VFX (6-segment jagged Pixi Graphics from mouth to target, tick-deterministic seed, 4-tick visible + 8-tick fade, glow via duplicate-draw), P0d creatureRenderer.ts procedural alive transforms (head-tracking rotation +/-25 toward targetBondId, ATTACK wind-up -12 lean-forward, ticker ordering post-FSM per Grok-DG4), P0e screen-shake + sparks (new src/render/screenShake.ts 6-tick decay + 12-particle radial spark burst inline in creatureRenderer), P0f tests + preview-tool screenshot verification (arcFlash.test + screenShake.test, preview_screenshot at 6 lifecycle points, bundle <=500KB, 537 existing tests pass). SUCCESS: screenshots show mp4 frames during cinematic + creature visible post-cinematic + cyan lightning bolt at fire-tick. Self-audit + /handoff at end of session.

priorities.label: Cinematic mp4 playback fix — src/render/cutsceneOverlay.ts defensive multi-fix addressing H1+H2+H3+H4 (muted=true + Texture.from-after-loadeddata + autoUpdate=true + ticker-update-hook + drop-crossOrigin + debug-logs + video.load+currentTime-nudge per Grok-DG1)

ATTACK FSM diagnostic + verification — main.ts pendingCreatureSpawn poll path read (per Grok-DG2 verify-handoff-before-edits) + ?debug=1 console.log every 60 ticks (state+ticksInState+targetBondId+pos) + fix surfaced bugs in-place if any

Procedural alive transforms — additions to creatureRenderer.ts (~80 LOC) — head-tracking rotation toward targetBondId clamped +/-25deg, ATTACK wind-up -12deg lean-forward rotation, recovery snap-back, sequencing constraint per Grok-DG4 (renderer.sync runs AFTER creatureLifecycle FSM ticks each frame)

Tests + preview-tool screenshot verification — arcFlash.test.ts + screenShake.test.ts + extend creatureRenderer.test.ts + bundle regression test (<=500KB) + 537 existing tests pass + preview_start on session port + programmatic cinematic trigger via window.__SPARK__.controls.dispatchFn + preview_screenshot at 6 lifecycle points (cinematic-start, mp4-mid, creature-spawn, seeking, attacking-windup, fire-tick lightning visible) + preview_console_logs for debug diagnostics + self-audit before /handoff
